name: Parking Permit
description: Sender is applying for or renewing a parking permit
checks: Is this a new application or renewal?
Are required documents mentioned (proof of residency, rego)?

outcomes.permit_application: New permit application with sufficient details

response_templates.permit_application: Thank you for your parking permit application for {location}. It will be processed within 10 business days.
response_templates.permit_renewal: Thank you for your permit renewal request for {location}. It will be processed within 5 business days.
response_templates.permit_incomplete: Thank you for your parking permit enquiry. To process your application, we require: {missing_items}.
